title: Redact secrets in formatted output
scenario: Logging helpers should make accidental secret exposure difficult. A wrapper can intentionally hide sensitive values when formatted.
instructions: Define Secret and implement Display so it always writes [redacted].

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps log-redacted-secret explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
